description: German online pharmacy offering prescription medication delivery, OTC products, and health products. One of Europe's largest digital pharmacies with 7M+ customers.
business_model: B2C - Direct to consumers; some B2B for care facilities
target_market: German consumers seeking convenient pharmacy services
competitive_advantage: Large scale in German market, established logistics, regulatory compliance

varden_fit.rationale: Potential pharmacy partner for occupational health prescriptions in Germany
